Cookie.title: Cookie preferences
Cookie.descriptionBeforePrivacy: We use strictly necessary cookies to remember your choices. With your permission, we use Google Analytics to understand how our site is used. See our
Cookie.strictlyNecessaryDescription: Required to store your consent and run core site features. Always on.
Cookie.analyticsDescription: Helps us measure traffic and improve the experience. Optional.

GiftVoucher.metaDescription: Give a specific treatment at The Skinbar as a digital gift voucher — choose a procedure, personalise your message, and pay securely online.
GiftVoucher.heroTitle: Give the gift of glowing skin
GiftVoucher.heroSubtitle: Choose a treatment, add a personal message, and we will deliver a digital voucher by email — ready to book.
GiftVoucher.termsBlurb: Vouchers are valid for 12 months from purchase. The recipient books directly with the salon using the unique code.
GiftVoucher.personalMessagePlaceholder: Wishing you a relaxing hour just for you…
GiftVoucher.submitError: We could not start checkout. Please try again or contact the salon.
GiftVoucher.disabledDescription: Please check back soon or contact us to arrange a gift manually.
GiftVoucher.successTitle: Thank you — your gift is on its way
GiftVoucher.successDescription: We have emailed the voucher to the recipient and sent you a confirmation copy.

validation.recipientEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid recipient email.
validation.senderEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email for your receipt.
